name: @photo-tools/filex-desktop
description: FileX Suite desktop shell for Windows packaging and native bridge work.
author: ImageStudio di Gennaro Mazzacane

scripts.build:auto-layout: cross-env FILEX_TOOL=auto-layout-app npm run build:shell && npm --workspace @photo-tools/auto-layout-app run build
scripts.build:image-party-frame: cross-env FILEX_TOOL=image-party-frame npm run build:shell && npm --workspace @photo-tools/image-party-frame-app run build
scripts.build:image-id-print: cross-env FILEX_TOOL=image-id-print npm run build:shell && npm --workspace @photo-tools/image-id-print run build && npm run build:image-id-print-sidecar && npm run fetch:image-id-print-model && npm run stage:image-id-print-runtime
scripts.build:archivio-flow: cross-env FILEX_TOOL=archivio-flow npm run build:shell && npm --workspace @photo-tools/archivio-flow run build && npm --workspace @photo-tools/archivio-flow run build:server && node ./scripts/copy-archivio-server.mjs
scripts.build:photo-selector: cross-env FILEX_TOOL=photo-selector-app npm run build:shell && npm --workspace @photo-tools/photo-selector-app run build
scripts.start:auto-layout: npm run build:auto-layout && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=auto-layout-app electron .
scripts.start:image-party-frame: npm run build:image-party-frame && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=image-party-frame electron .
scripts.start:image-id-print: npm run build:image-id-print && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=image-id-print electron .
scripts.start:archivio-flow: npm run build:archivio-flow && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=archivio-flow electron .
scripts.start:photo-selector: npm run build:photo-selector && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=photo-selector-app electron .
scripts.dev:photo-selector: npm run build:shell && concurrently -k "npm --workspace @photo-tools/photo-selector-app run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4175" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:4175 && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=photo-selector-app FILEX_RENDERER_MODE=dev FILEX_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4175 electron ."
scripts.dist:auto-layout:win: npm run build:auto-layout && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=auto-layout-app electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win nsis
scripts.dist:auto-layout:mac: npm run build:auto-layout && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=auto-layout-app electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:image-party-frame:win: npm run build:image-party-frame && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=image-party-frame electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win nsis
scripts.dist:image-party-frame:mac: npm run build:image-party-frame && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=image-party-frame electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:image-id-print:win: npm run build:image-id-print && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=image-id-print electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win nsis
scripts.dist:image-id-print:mac: npm run build:image-id-print && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=image-id-print electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:image-id-print:mac:x64: npm run build:image-id-print && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=image-id-print electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg zip --x64
scripts.dist:image-id-print:mac:arm64: npm run build:image-id-print && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=image-id-print electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg zip --arm64
scripts.dist:archivio-flow:win: npm run build:archivio-flow && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=archivio-flow electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win nsis --x64 --ia32
scripts.dist:archivio-flow:win64: npm run build:archivio-flow && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=archivio-flow electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:archivio-flow:win32: npm run build:archivio-flow && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=archivio-flow electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win nsis --ia32
scripts.dist:archivio-flow:mac: npm run build:archivio-flow && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=archivio-flow electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:photo-selector:win: npm run build:photo-selector && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=photo-selector-app electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win nsis --x64 --ia32
scripts.dist:photo-selector:win64: npm run build:photo-selector && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=photo-selector-app electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:photo-selector:win32: npm run build:photo-selector && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=photo-selector-app electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win nsis --ia32
scripts.dist:photo-selector:mac: npm run build:photo-selector && cross-env FILEX_TOOL=photo-selector-app electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg zip
